title: Gar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gar''' could refer to any of the following:

===Canon===
*'''[[Gar (human)|Gar]]''', [[Jocasta Nu]]'s [[Aide|assistant]]
*'''[[Gar Saxon]]''', a [[Mandalorian]] [[commander]]
*[[Grand Army of the Republic|'''"GAR"''']], short for "Grand Army of the Republic"

===Legends===
*'''[[Gar (Annoo)|Gar]]'''; a farmer and resistance fighter from Annoo
*'''[[Gar (Dantooine)|Gar]]'''; a farmer from Dantooine
*'''[[Gar (Gamorrean)|Gar]]'''; a Gamorrean
*'''[[Gar (Talz)|Gar]]'''; a Talz collaborator
*'''[[Gar Anstak]]'''; a Jedi Master
*'''[[Gar Berra]]'''; [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]] officer
*'''[[Gar Gastinin]]'''; a Duros spacer
*'''[[Gar-Oth]]'''; ruler of the Yahk-Tosh Empire
*[[Gar Saxon/Legends|'''Gar Saxon''']], a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]]
*'''[[Gar Stazi]]'''; [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] officer and leader of the [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]]
*'''[[Gar-Ul]]'''; a Weequay criminal
*[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|'''"GAR"''']], short for "Grand Army of the Republic"

{{Disambig}}

|de=Gar
|ja=ガー
|nl=Gar
}}
